programme.title: Rehearsal for Murder
programme.desc: Alex Dennison Robert Preston is a playwright engaged to actress Monica Welles Lynn Redgrave But on the opening night of her new Broadway play she kills herself over some bad reviews Thoroughly distraught Alex cant believe shed commit suicide and begins to suspect she was actually murdered Under the pretext of having them read for his new play Alex invites all of the suspicious parties to an empty theater and locks them in until the truth comes out

programme.title: Leave of Absence
programme.desc: When a married mans mistress falls seriously ill he must make the toughest choice of his life

programme.title: TBH 123
programme.desc: TBH 123

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Shady Rests Annual Jamboree is threatened when railroad CEO Norman Curtis breaks the Cannonballs throttle lever but the executive tries to make amends with a determined effort to obtain the nearly-nonexistent replacement part

programme.title: Munsters 211
programme.desc: Munsters 211

programme.title: Addams 202
programme.desc: Addams 202

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Stubings ex-wife who has remarried a cruise line exec drives Stubing and crew crazy with demands Former centerfold Sandy Rytell hides old nude photos from her fiancé Jenny OBrien tries to get her boyfriend Ron Baker to marry her

programme.title: Daktari 321
programme.desc: Daktari 321

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Hart to Hart

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney becomes involved with a fellow detective who uses cocaine and must make a difficult decision whether to let it go or turn him in

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Selma stops by the hotel She falls while breaking through the hammock that Joe just purchased at the church rummage sale and just erected Although Janet cant find anything medically wrong with her Selma feigns whiplash and a back injury which requires her to be bedridden As Henrietta is away the girls and Janet suggest she stay at the hotel while she recuperates Selma is not only a demanding unpaid guest but it looks as if she is planning on suing which could mean the girls losing the hotel Consulting a lawyer - the wrong lawyer - could mean even worse news for Joe Only a miracle or perhaps the truth could save Joe and the girls from losing the hotel

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S06E11

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa gets into an egg feud with a rival egg salesman He makes money but the rest of the family suffers when Hassie wants to date the rivals son

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A young orphan named Theodores adopted by the odd and well-off Colberts with a dark secret Theyre not the only ones

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A fast food owner has only one goal in life - to utterly destroy and humiliate his competition However he gets a taste of his own medicine

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A fashion designer demands too much from his model which leads to her suicide This gets all those hed wronged to seek revenge

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When Nick Knight goes to investigate the alleged suicide of a space scientist he discovers that an asteroid is heading for Earth and is projected to strike within 3 months

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A dentist uses a cursed electric chair to seek revenge against those who wronged him

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Fredy 114
programme.desc: Fredy 114

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: In Los Angeles aspiring screenwriter Edward Foster from Indiana has a crush on his neighbor Miranda Singer However bimbo Miranda is a gold digger who does not give Edward any attention His unrequited love is noticed by his creepy landlord Mr Stronham who offers Edward a love potion in order to seduce Miranda Will the potion work

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E24
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E24

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max enters the world of art looking for an art thief know as Bronzefinger

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS is using parrots to learn secret formulas and then KAOS smuggles them out of the country

programme.title: BJ and the Bear S03E04 Part 2
programme.desc: BJ and the Bear S03E04 Part 2

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger invests in Lady Linda a lovesick racehorse that wont run so its Mister Ed the love doctor to the rescue

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: George Burns is offering 25000 for a great new novelty act so Wilbur begs Mister Ed to talk to Mr Burns

programme.title: Hogans 309
programme.desc: Hogans 309

programme.title: Hogans 228
programme.desc: Hogans 228

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Binghamton finds out that Parker is an old friend of a famous War Correspondent he makes Parker the Base PR Officer in the hope of becoming the subject of the Correspondents next story But Parkers plan to improve The Captains image backfires

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber and the guys concoct a very tall story to try to turn Tinker into a hero so that he can win the heart of his favorite girl But the rumor of Tinkers Secret mission soon spreads throughout the South Pacific and trouble develops when glory-hungry Binghamton tries to get in on the action

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A Colonel and his young daughter are visiting Camp Henderson While befriending the little girl Pyle has no problem getting her and himself in trouble with everyone

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carter is chosen to appear in a documentary but becomes an absurd camera hog leaving producers no choice but to follow Gomer performing punishments Carter doles out

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan moves to the other side of the island when the other castaways suddenly become allergic to him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan finds sunflower seeds on the island that gives him the ability to read minds and when the fellow castaways find out they want in on the action

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E05
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E05

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD try to stop Gadget from attending the International Congress of Policemen in London

programme.title: What A Way To Go
programme.desc: A four-time widow discusses her four marriages in which all of her husbands became incredibly rich and died prematurely because of their drive to be rich

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Tennis pro Maureen Mitchell Brenda Benet runs into sportswriter John Ballard Bill Bixby who defamed her in his column Cyril Wolfe Milton Berle annoys his wife Anita Audra Lindley and fellow passengers Lynn Adams and Britt Leach with constant practical jokes Mexican April Lopez Charo stows away in a laundry hamper

programme.title: WKRP 116
programme.desc: WKRP 116

programme.title: WKRP 212
programme.desc: WKRP 212

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: When a Hollywood film crew arrives in town to shoot a Civil War mini-series the townsfolk flock to play extras Wood is cast as a Confederate colonel The shoot is beset with problems including temperamental actress Shelly Darling

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Everyone is dealing with issues at Christmastime Wood is so tired of his childrens materialism that he donates all of their gifts to a hard-luck family in the neighborhood

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Dan helps a nun locate some property that was bequeathed to her He learns that the property is the land that Roths hotel is on While Roth tries to deal with her Someone tries to kill her

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: At the haunted house recently purchased by the Harts weird friends Fred and Amanda a dinner party turns into a deadly treasure hunt

programme.title: Hercules 221
programme.desc: Hercules 221

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Senators daughter is found to have kryss in her system Liam and Renee suspect the Taelons lied about synthesizing it and there is a new location for production They believe Federov is involved Daan is addicted to kryss

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: To escape capture an alien merges with a pregnant woman This causes unexpected consequences for the aliens and for Blackwoods team - and violence for the hospital staff when the womanalien goes into labor

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills father an adventurer by trade arrives in town to search for a rare flower

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane injects a dead man with a life-restoring serum that gives him the touch of death

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The arrival of the Alphans on another planet seems to cause a change in its atmosphere setting off pollution and poisoning of the water They meet Zoran the sole survivor of the last exploratory force who tells them that the planet is controlled by an immortal being - with whom Koenig must parley if he and his crew are to leave the planet alive

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 213
programme.desc: Hercules 213

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Officer Jimmy Vegas personal vendetta against a local drug dealer threatens to ruin both his and Inspector Kellers careers

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rollin and Barney are sent to investigate the case of a scientist who believes her dead husbands ghost is giving her orders on how to complete her important work

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A hated construction company owner with a heart condition recognizes Kimble and forces him to be his office assistant because of his doctor skills

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Everyone except Heath who has met the stranger and knows some of his exploits firsthand extends a warm welcome to the aging cowboy who killed the murderer of patriarch Tom Barkley during the Barkley-Railroad War The man as it turns out is a friend to no one Hes a sociopath and mercenary who enjoys range wars and will sell his sanguinary services to either side And hes looking for work

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is asked by Matt Reardon a gunfighter to help him with a mission after he rescues Cheyenne from a fight Reardon wants to repay a debt to the widow of the first man he killed who was also his partner Her son gets in the way

programme.title: Young 216
programme.desc: Young 216

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: Arena

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: Godzilla Vs Mechagodzilla II
programme.desc: The United Nations assembles the ultimate weapon to defeat Godzilla while scientists discover a fresh pteranodon egg on a remote Japanese island

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 26 filmed at the Art Hauser Centre in Prince Albert. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle in the cage. Brendan Mooney vs. Brad Lammy; Tyrone Halkett vs. Brad Campbell; Thomas Richardson vs. Cody Bowman; Evander Masuskapoe vs. Randell Martell; Devon Smith vs. Elias Cepeda.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.desc: Xavier Sedras v. Jefferson George

programme.desc: Sergio y Lupita la única pareja que te informa de forma veraz oportuna con un toque personal y humano

programme.desc: ¿Qué son las finanzas ¿qué son y para qué sirven los impuestos De la mano de Dario Celis conoce la información en economía finanzas y negocios El noticiario con las tendencias en materia de dinero e inversión

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce hears a rumour planted by Saw Boss that Audric is aboard the Edro Life ship a ship that is capable of carrying entire civilisations to new galaxies Jayce is able to get aboard the ship by steering the Pride through the thrusters energy flow

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Miles Mayhem has gotten hold of Brian the Brain a super computer that controls a nuclear sub With it he demands full control of the Panamal Canal

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Out in the New Orleans Bayou Jacques Lancaster has been using sap from the fire trees as a powerful but volatile fuel Miles Mayhem wants to use it to power VENOMs vehicles

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Simon gets shot by a love-at-first-sight arrow and falls in love with Mother Brain

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After the Computer Mind Mirror of Mother Brain says that Princess Lana is the most beautiful of them all the Eggplant Wizard makes a poison apple that will make Princess Lana fall asleep

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadgets skiing holiday is interrupted when MAD try to rob a Swiss bank of its gold reserves

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby instructs Gadget to retrieve a powerful microcomputer from MAD that is capable of teleportation

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades gain an ally in Trident a cybernetichuman mix who takes the worlds leaders hostage

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill cons a well-meaning alien into helping liberate GoBotron by attacking the Guardians

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League lands on a desert planet with no plant life assuming that is where Audric would be They are mistakenly led by a mirage of Audric to try and rescue him but they are attacked by the native nomads who have been tricked
